label: .NET / C# conventions
value:
## .NET / C# Coding Standards

- Use async/await throughout and avoid `.Result` / `.Wait()`.
- Enable nullable reference types in `.csproj`: `<Nullable>enable</Nullable>`.
- Prefer constructor injection and avoid service locator patterns.
- Keep controllers thin: validation, dispatch, response mapping.
- Use EF Core async methods and avoid raw SQL string concatenation.
- Turn on warnings as errors for analyzers and code style.
